name: Holiday Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------SWEET CRUST--------------------------------
1/2 cup Pastry flour, whole-wheat
1/2 cup Flour, unbleached white
3 1/2 tbsp Soy margarine, cut into bits
1/4 tsp Nutmeg, grated
1 pinch Salt (optional)
3 tbsp Water, ice
1. Place flour, margarine, nutmeg and salt in a food processor and process for 10 seconds to a cornmeal texture. With the processor running, add 1-1/2 teaspoons ice water. Add remaining water slowly, and stop the machine as soon as the dough begins to form a ball. Tiny pieces of margarine should be visible in the dough.
2. Form the dough into a ball and flatten it into a thick disc. Flour your work surface and rolling pin and roll the dough from the center out to the sides, turning occasionally until it is a perfect circle about 10 inches in diameter.
3. Place the rolling pin in the center of the dough. Fold half over the pin and transfer to a 9-inch pie plate, folding the rough edges under neatly or trimming them. Cover the pie plate with a slightly damp kitchen towel and place in the refrigerator.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Blend the filling ingredients until smooth and creamy in a blender or food processor. Pour into the prepared pie shell and bake for 1 hour.
6. Chill and serve.
